daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving main character energy today. The universe is whispering that it's time to trust your instincts and lean into the conversations that feel real. Something's shifting, and you're ready for it.
daily.love: Whether you're solo or coupled up, your authenticity is your superpower rn. If you've been holding back what you actually feel, today's the day to let it out. Real connection happens when you stop performing.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today—don't sleep on that creative spark. This is solid energy for pitching something you've been sitting on or finally having that conversation you've been avoiding.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down just a bit. Nothing intense needed—maybe a walk, some water, or actually finishing one thing before starting another. Small acts of presence = big energy shifts.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. You're feeling chatty and curious about everything, which honestly? Kind of your superpower rn. Trust those random conversations—they might lead somewhere unexpectedly cool.
weekly.love: Someone's vibing with your energy more than usual. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a softness in the air that makes connection feel less forced and more... natural. Let yourself be a little vulnerable.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. That project or proposal you've been sitting on? This is the moment to share it. Your voice carries weight right now, so speak up with confidence.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for a breather. Try something grounding—long walks, journaling, literally touching grass. Your body knows what it needs; just gotta listen to that inner voice.
